title: centrosema arenicola
intro: Centrosema arenicola, also known as the yellow bush bean or sensitive plant, is a leguminous vine native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. The health benefits of Centrosema arenicola include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea or used in tincture form, with some studies suggesting its effectiveness in treating conditions such as rheumatism and eczema.
